codeReview.summary: Message storage feature is fully implemented. The Message model exists with all required fields (id, session_id, role, content, created_at). SessionService.add_message() handles message storage with timestamps. The POST /{session_id}/messages endpoint allows storing messages and GET /{session_id} retrieves session with messages ordered chronologically by created_at. All 120 tests pass including dedicated message storage tests (TestSessionWithMessages, TestSessionDetailWithMessages, TestMessageModel). Lint and typecheck pass with no issues.

fulfillmentCheck.VAL-SESSION-003: pass - User messages stored via POST /{session_id}/messages endpoint with created_at timestamp. Messages retrieved in chronological order via GET /{session_id} endpoint.

summary: Message storage feature passes review. Implementation includes Message model, SessionService.add_message(), API endpoints for storing and retrieving messages chronologically, and comprehensive test coverage. All validation assertions satisfied.
